prompt: Design a music shop receipt using music symbols from the first image and a waveform pattern as a decorative border from the second.
prompt_refined: Generate a digital image of a music shop receipt. The receipt should integrate various music notation symbols from image 1 as decorative design elements throughout its content. Additionally, apply the distinct waveform pattern from image 2 as a continuous decorative border along the top and bottom edges of the receipt.
objects: various music notation symbols from image 1, integrated as decorative design elements within the receipt content
the waveform pattern from image 2, applied as a continuous decorative border along the top edge of the receipt
the waveform pattern from image 2, applied as a continuous decorative border along the bottom edge of the receipt
